$schema: SSH-driven equivalent of Test-Workload.guest.ubuntu.server.k8s.website.json. Selected automatically when test-config.json has keystrokeMechanism='ssh'.

$actions.delay: Wait a fixed number of seconds. Parameters: seconds (number).
$actions.sshWaitReady: Wait until the guest accepts SSH using the yuruna harness key. Parameters: timeoutSeconds (number), pollSeconds (number).
$actions.sshExec: Run a command on the guest over SSH. Parameters: command (string), timeoutSeconds (number), allowFailure (boolean), sensitive (boolean).
$actions.sshFetchAndExecute: Run a long-lived command over SSH (SSH equivalent of fetchAndExecute). Parameters: command (string), timeoutSeconds (number).

description: Ubuntu Server (with ubuntu-desktop, SSH): install Kubernetes, deploy website to localhost cluster, verify HTTP 200 - parallel path to the keystroke sequence. Reuses guest.ubuntu.desktop workload scripts.

steps.description: Wait for sshd + cloud-init authorized_keys to be ready
Verify at least one node is Ready
